channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: Bulawayo’s 159-bed complex houses nearly 1 000 people @bulawayo24
item.description: Bulawayo’s ageing workers’ hostels, originally built in the 1950s to accommodate single male industrial workers, have evolved into severely overcrowded family settlements, with one complex designed fo... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Bata’s production capacity surges @bulawayo24
item.description: Footwear manufacturer Bata Shoe Company has increased production capacity utilisation from 27 percent to 42 percent and is targeting 65 percent as improved currency stability and growing demand for lo... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Zimbabwe clinics sit on unused Starlink kits @bulawayo24
item.description: Hundreds of hospitals and clinics across Zimbabwe have been equipped with Starlink satellite internet kits under a government drive to improve healthcare connectivity, but many facilities are unable t... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Zimbabwe enters global battery chemicals market @bulawayo24
item.description: Zimbabwe has taken a significant step up the global lithium value chain with the commissioning of Africa’s first lithium sulphate processing plant, a US$400 million investment expected to create more... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: SA Court ‘yanyudza’ Nyokayemabhunu: Blessed Geza’s Close Friend Fears Poisoning and Death if Extradited to Zimbabwe
item.description: The Nyokayemabhunu Trap: Why a ‘Minor Fraud’ is Being Used to Silence Zimbabwe’s Loudest Online Critic Johannesburg – The Randburg Magistrate’s Court has cleared the path for the extradition of Wellington Masiwa, widely recognised by his online moniker, “Comrade Nyokayemabhunu.” This ruling, delivered in a South African court, marks a significant legal setback for Masiwa, [...] The post SA Court ‘yanyudza’ Nyokayemabhunu: Blessed Geza’s Close Friend Fears Poisoning and Death if Extradited to Zimbabwe first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: RBZ injects US$2.1 billion to support ZiG stability @bulawayo24 @ReserveBankZIM
item.description: The Reserve Bank of Zimbabwe (RBZ) has injected US$2.1 billion into the foreign exchange market since April 2024 under the Willing-Buyer Willing-Seller (WBWS) trading system, underscoring the scale of... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Zimbabwe exorbitant airlines taxes comes under spotlight @bulawayo24
item.description: Zimbabwe is among African countries imposing high taxes and statutory charges on airlines, with the heavy cost burden threatening the long-term viability of the aviation sector, Airlines Association o... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Mnangagwa Orders Release of Justice Uchena Commission Report on State Land Sales
item.description: President Mnangagwa orders the release of the Justice Uchena Commission report, revealing key findings into State land sales across Zimbabwe. The post Mnangagwa Orders Release of Justice Uchena Commission Report on State Land Sales appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Andy Rinomhota reveals the position he wants to play for Reading this season
item.description: Andy Rinomhota reveals his preferred position for Reading this season, explaining where he believes he can make the biggest impact. The post Andy Rinomhota reveals the position he wants to play for Reading this season appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: The British Nightmare: How a Violent Zimbabwean Man Fooled Heathrow Security After Killing His Wife and 2 Children
item.description: In a case that has gripped two continents, Ndodana Mkhanyisi Tshuma, a 45-year-old British citizen of Zimbabwean heritage, stands accused of a heinous triple murder in Great Denham, Bedfordshire. The brutal killings of his wife, Nothabo Zandile Tshuma, 42, and their two young daughters, Natalie, 15, and Nala, five, have exposed not only the devastating [...] The post The British Nightmare: How a Violent Zimbabwean Man Fooled Heathrow Security After Killing His Wife and 2 Children first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: Learnmore Jonasi wins as US$27 million Lion King lawsuit thrown out by US court @nehandaradio @learnmorejonasi
item.description: Zimbabwean comedian Learnmore Jonasi has scored a major legal victory after a US judge dismissed Lebo M’s US$27 million defamation lawsuit over his viral Lion King joke. The post Learnmore Jonasi wins as US$27 million Lion King lawsuit thrown out by US court appeared first on Nehanda Radio. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: Murowa Diamonds placed under corporate rescue as RioZim financial crisis deepens @nehandaradio
item.description: Zimbabwe’s Murowa Diamond Mine has entered corporate rescue, freezing legal action by creditors as authorities race to stabilise one of the country’s key diamond producers. The post Murowa Diamonds placed under corporate rescue as RioZim financial crisis deepens appeared first on Nehanda Radio. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: Mutapa Gold Resources targets 3.6 tonnes of gold output, US$500m revenue in 2026
item.description: State-owned Mutapa Gold Resources (MGR) is targeting 3,600 kilogrammes (3.6 tonnes) of gold production in 2026 after posting strong output growth during the first half of the year. Speaking during Mines and Mining Development Minister Polite Kambamura’s technical visit to Freda Rebecca Gold Mine on Thursday, MGR chief executive Patrick Shayawabaya said the company produced [...] The post Mutapa Gold Resources targets 3.6 tonnes of gold output, US$500m revenue in 2026 appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Remittances to hold steady despite return of thousands from South Africa, says Mnangagwa spokesperson
item.description: THE return of Zimbabweans from South Africa fleeing xenophobic attacks will not affect Zimbabwe’s remittances, which account for a significant proportion of the gross domestic product, a government official has said. According to statistics, Zimbabwe has since recorded US$1.55 billion in diaspora remittances, a figure that is expected to double before the year-end, as per [...] The post Remittances to hold steady despite return of thousands from South Africa, says Mnangagwa spokesperson appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Zimbabwean woman who died at Beitbridge not part of repatriation – South Africa says
item.description: The South African Home Affairs Department has said a Zimbabwean woman who passed away on Tuesday after she collapsed at the Beitbridge Border Post in Limpopo was not part of those who were being repatriated. The department’s Chief Director Albert Matsaung says the woman had travelled from Pietermaritzburg in KwaZulu-Natal on a bus that was [...] The post Zimbabwean woman who died at Beitbridge not part of repatriation – South Africa says appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News
